sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100120" key="sunecatone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεξ-ᾰτονέω</orth>, <sense id="n100120.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lose tension</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vigour together with</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ πρόσωπον τῇ ψυχῇ ς</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.528e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
